sections.paragraph: an unused root; in Chaldee to bind. Compare אָכַד, עָקַד, and my farther remarks on the root גִּיד. In Arabic some of its derivatives are applied to arched or vaulted work, edifices of firmly compacted structure, because of the strong coherence of all the parts, and the firm compactness; compare אָחַז and אֲגֻדָּה No.4. Hence-
